7:
WITH seg_growth AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2012,
           SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2013
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
growth_calc AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           (cons2013 - cons2012) / cons2012 * 100.0 AS growth
    FROM seg_growth
)
SELECT Segment, growth FROM growth_calc ORDER BY growth DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, growth FROM growth_calc ORDER BY growth ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
    (COALESCE(s2012.total2012,0) - COALESCE(s2013.total2013,0)) /
    COALESCE(s2012.total2012,1) AS decline_rate
FROM
    (SELECT SUM(Amount) AS total2012
     FROM transactions_1k
     WHERE CustomerID = (
           SELECT CustomerID
           FROM transactions_1k
           WHERE Price = 634.8
             AND Date = '2012-08-25'
           LIMIT 1
         )
       AND Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31'
    ) AS s2012
CROSS JOIN
    (SELECT SUM(Amount) AS total2013
     FROM transactions_1k
     WHERE CustomerID = (
           SELECT CustomerID
           FROM transactions_1k
           WHERE Price = 634.8
             AND Date = '2012-08-25'
           LIMIT 1
         )
       AND Date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
    ) AS s2013;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH client_avg AS (
    SELECT
        c.client_id,
        COALESCE(AVG(t.amount), 0) AS avg_income
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    LEFT JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id
),
oldest_age AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(birth_date)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER)) AS max_age
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
oldest_clients AS (
    SELECT
        c.client_id
    FROM client c
    JOIN oldest_age oa ON CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) = oa.max_age
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_client_avg AS (
    SELECT
        ca.client_id,
        ca.avg_income
    FROM client_avg ca
    JOIN oldest_clients oc ON ca.client_id = oc.client_id
),
min_oldest_avg AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_income) AS min_avg FROM oldest_client_avg
),
max_all_avg AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_income) AS max_avg FROM client_avg
),
diff AS (
    SELECT (max_all_avg.max_avg - min_oldest_avg.min_avg) AS diff
    FROM max_all_avg, min_oldest_avg
)
SELECT
    a.account_id,
    diff.diff
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN oldest_client_avg oca ON d.client_id = oca.client_id
JOIN diff ON 1=1;	----- bird -----	financial
